key_dungeons.name: Obsidian Barrow
key_dungeons.description: Bones litter the threshold of Obsidian Barrow. Whatever guards this place does not welcome visitors.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Obsidian Barrow of evil and secure the Coral Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.

game_log: Welcome to Larkhaven!
Elder Cato: Seek out the travelers in our towns. They know of dangers that threaten the land.
Elder Cato: Seek out the travelers in our towns. They know of dangers that threaten the land.
Alaric the Wanderer: I've been searching for someone brave enough to help.
Alaric the Wanderer: The Obsidian Barrow holds a powerful artifact. Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
Alaric the Wanderer: Will you seek it out and bring it back?
Alaric the Wanderer: Thank you, brave souls! I've marked the Obsidian Barrow on your map. Be careful out there!
You descend into Obsidian Barrow - Floor 1... No torch equipped!

Welcome to Larkhaven!
Alaric the Wanderer: You recovered the Coral Key! Here is 150 gold for your bravery!

Orin: Thank you! I've marked a suspicious location on your map. Be careful down there!

Welcome to Larkhaven!
-- Sunken Shipwreck --
The broken mast of a ship juts from the shallow water near shore. Barnacles coat the rotting wood.
You wade out to the wreck and find a waterlogged chest wedged in the hull.
Sunken Shipwreck
You descend into Hunt the Goblins - Level 1... Torch lit!

The portal returns you to the surface!
-- Fairy Ring --
A perfect circle of pale mushrooms grows in the grass. The air inside the ring shimmers faintly.
You step into the fairy ring. Tiny lights swirl around you and your senses sharpen.
Fairy Ring
Welcome to Larkhaven!

-- Poison Swamp --
Bubbles of noxious gas rise from murky green water. The stench is overpowering. Dead trees stand like skeletal sentries.
The swamp's fumes burn your lungs and the muck clings to your boots.
Poison Swamp
-- Forgotten Grave --
A lone headstone leans crookedly in the earth. The inscription has been worn smooth by centuries of rain.
You brush the dirt from the headstone and notice a loose stone at the base. Beneath it, something glints.
Forgotten Grave

-- Signpost --
A weathered wooden signpost at a crossroads. The writing is faded but still legible.
Signpost
-- Worried Woman --
A woman in a torn dress stands at the roadside, wringing her hands. She looks desperate for help.
Please, brave adventurers! Creatures have overrun my home. My family's heirloom is still inside. Will you help me?
Worried Woman
Elara: Thank you! The house is just north of here. Be careful!
Quest accepted: Retrieve the Family Heirloom from Elara's house.
The party defeated Troll and Wolves.
-- Bandit Cache --
Freshly disturbed earth beneath a distinctive lightning-struck oak. Someone has been burying things here.
You dig beneath the tree and unearth a leather satchel filled with stolen goods.
Bandit Cache
